title: 5-Pack Plastic Storage Baskets with Sturdy Handles, Lightweight & Durable Design, Ideal for Kitchen, Bathroom, and Cleaning Organisation, 3.9L Capacity, 17 x 25 x 11cm
features: 𝐓𝐑𝐀𝐍𝐒𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐒𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐄 𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐎 𝐎𝐑𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐈𝐒𝐄𝐃 𝐄𝐋𝐄𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄 – Whether in the kitchen, bathroom, or cleaning areas, these versatile storage baskets help create a clutter-free, stress-free environment with ease.
𝐎𝐏𝐓𝐈𝐌𝐀𝐋 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐓 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐀𝐆𝐄 – Each basket offers a 3.9L capacity with dimensions of 17cm x 25cm x 11cm, providing ample space for essentials while fitting conveniently in small spaces.
𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐖𝐄𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓 & 𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐓𝐎 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐄 – Weighing only 267 grams, these baskets are designed for effortless mobility and stacking, making organisation a hassle-free task in any room.

𝐌𝐎𝐃𝐄𝐑𝐍 𝐀𝐄𝐒𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐓𝐈𝐂 𝐓𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐋𝐄𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐒 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐃𝐄𝐂𝐎𝐑 – With a chic, minimalist design, these baskets not only help you stay organised but also enhance the look of your home, whether for storing craft supplies, makeup, or cleaning products.

𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍𝐄𝐃 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐈𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐂𝐄 – Made from sturdy plastic and featuring durable handles, these baskets are built for everyday use. Stackable for easy storage, they make accessing items on shelves or in cupboards simple and efficient.
